short_desc: Outstanding care from admission to discharge
review_text: From my pre-assessment right through to discharge the care was exceptional. The nursing staff were kind and professional and my consultant explained everything clearly. I was walking unaided at 6 weeks.

short_desc: The cardiology team saved my life
review_text: I was admitted as an emergency with a heart attack. The speed and skill of the team was extraordinary. My follow-up care has been equally impressive — I feel well-informed and supported throughout.

short_desc: Best possible start for our family
review_text: The maternity team at this hospital made the birth of our son a truly positive experience. The midwives were calm, supportive and skilled. The postnatal care was thorough and I felt completely safe.
I was in and out the same day for my procedure. Everything ran to time, the staff were friendly and professional, and the discharge instructions were clear and thorough. Excellent experience.

short_desc: Very short wait and excellent consultant
review_text: My outpatient appointment was on time and my consultant spent a full 20 minutes with me, explained my test results clearly and answered all my questions. I left feeling reassured and well-informed.

short_desc: Back to walking my dog after 3 months
review_text: I was nervous about hip replacement but the team's reassurance beforehand and the quality of aftercare made all the difference. I'm now walking pain-free — something I haven't been able to do for years.
